creator: git@mikewatkins.ca
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #9)

While the documentation for Dell Latitude 7420 and related devices suggests there is an option, my device does not offer any configuration tweaks in bios whatsoever related to the touchpad. The only HID device noted is keyboard (function key or media key lock). Dell bios options are quite extensive.

The option might have been there in prior firmware, but I don't recall ever seeing it.

Are there any tweaks or debug options I can enable to see if the PS2 issue is a factor?

I've put 14.2-RELEASE on, fresh install, minimal Wayland config, and am seeing the same behaviour.
